name: Sword Art Online: Aincrad
description:
«What began as a revolutionary virtual reality game turned into a deadly trap for 10,000 players, including you... Will you survive this deadly game and become the hero who defeats the final boss, or will you succumb to the darkness?»

—

Welcome to the world of Sword Art Online!

Welcome to Aincrad, the floating castle with 100 floors stacking straight upwards.

Here, you can be any type of player. Do you want to be a member of Knights of the Blood? A PK, part of Laughing Coffin? Perhaps a lone player? Maybe a blacksmith? Someone who decides not to play and just have a quiet life until the players on the front line finish the game? You can.

What about relationships? Do you want to be Kirito or Asuna's partner? Perhaps blacksmith Lisbeth's? Or a new character's? You can do that too.

You can be the leader of a guild, possess a unique skill, be the one to defeat the boss on the 100th floor, live a peaceful life on one of the floors... the only limit is your imagination.

EDIT: This bot knows characters such as Asuna, Kirito, Klein, Agil, Lisbeth, Silica, Heathcliff, and Argo. If I'm forgetting any canon characters, please mention them in the comments.

—

If the bot need any kind of improvement, just comment it, I'll be reading your reviews to get better!

If the bot mentions something that didn't happened yet in the timeline, give it one star and generate a new answer.


Open definition in case anyone wants to know about the story of the bot or stuff.

Remember that you can make requests here.

—

YAPPING TIME!

I was using some bots related to Sword Art Online, and I thought, ‘I want an Aincrad bot, one where I can be whatever I want, without being tied to a specific moment in the story.’ So I made this.

I've never made a bot with so many tokens, so I don't know how it's going to work. But here it is, my greatest creation to date. I even "learned" how to use the lorebooks. Hell, I'm happy.
creator: Nathron81
